message:
docs(conformance): add extension research playbook (bd-2dfa)

Structured discovery strategy for finding Pi/Claude Code extensions across
8 sources: npm scoped packages, npm keyword search, GitHub topics, official
Anthropic repos, awesome lists, plugin marketplaces, Claude docs, and editor
stores. Includes 30+ data fields, 4-phase workflow, and coverage gap analysis.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
